speaker: Draymond Green
prediction_text: The Oklahoma City Thunder will win their playoff series against the San Antonio Spurs.
argument: Championship trust: He said he was not going against the defending champions; Adjustment path: He argued Oklahoma City could fix the matchup with more shooting, more two-big lineups, and a stronger Holmgren-Wembanyama response.
grade_note: SAS beat OKC 4-3, so the Thunder did not win the playoff series.
